tree.name: Buddy Hield
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks trade Porzingis to Warriors for Kuminga and Buddy Hield

assetsGivenUp.name: Kristaps Porzingis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Hawks got Porzingis from Celtics, sent Niang + 2031 CLE 2nd to BOS, Mann + Drake Powell to BKN

assetsGivenUp.name: Georges Niang
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hawks traded De'Andre Hunter to Cavaliers for Niang and Caris LeVert. Cleveland also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: The Minivan - stretch four, career 40% 3PT shooter. Sent to BOS in Porzingis deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: De'Andre Hunter
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hawks traded picks #8, #17, #35, CLE 2021 2nd, and CLE 2022 2nd to Pelicans for #4 pick (used on Hunter), Solomon Hill, #57, and a 2023 2nd. Pick originally from LAL via Anthony Davis trade.
assetsGivenUp.note: Virginia product, #4 overall. Pick originated with Lakers, went to Pelicans in AD trade, then to Atlanta in draft-night deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#8)
assetsGivenUp.note: Atlanta's own pick, sent to NOP in Hunter draft-night trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#17) via BKN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hawks traded Taurean Prince and a 2021 2nd-round pick to Nets for Allen Crabbe, the #17 pick, and a protected 2020 1st-round pick.
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally Brooklyn's own 1st-round pick. Sent to NOP in Hunter draft-night trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Taurean Prince
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: ATL sent Jeff Teague to IND, IND sent George Hill to UTA, UTA sent #12 pick (Prince) to ATL.
assetsGivenUp.note: Baylor product, drafted 12th by Utah. ATL acquired via 3-team deal on draft night. Sent to BKN in 2019 for #17 pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jeff Teague
assetsGivenUp.note: Hawks' own pick, 19th overall in 2009. 3x All-Star with ATL. Sent to IND in 3-team deal that brought Taurean Prince.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#49)
assetsGivenUp.note: Atlanta's own 2021 2nd-round pick (#49). Sent to Brooklyn as part of the Taurean Prince trade. BKN used it to draft Zegarowski (Creighton).

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 2nd Round Pick (#35)
assetsGivenUp.note: Atlanta's own pick, sent to NOP in Hunter draft-night trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#35) via CLE
assetsGivenUp.note: CLE's 2021 2nd, acquired by ATL in Korver trade (2017), sent to NOP in Hunter draft-night trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 2nd Round Pick (#47) via CLE
assetsGivenUp.note: CLE's 2022 2nd (#47), acquired by ATL in Korver trade (2017), sent to NOP in Hunter draft-night trade. NOP re-routed to MEM, who drafted Vince Williams Jr.

assetsGivenUp.name: Terance Mann
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hawks traded Bogdan Bogdanović and a 2025 2nd round draft pick (MIN own, became Mohamed Diawara) to Clippers for Mann and Bones Hyland
assetsGivenUp.note: Versatile wing, 2021 playoff hero vs Utah. Sent to BKN in Porzingis deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bogdan Bogdanović
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed via sign-and-trade from Sacramento Kings, 4-year $72M deal

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#31) via MIN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Houston in 5-team trade involving Dillon Brooks
assetsGivenUp.note: Minnesota's 2025 2nd-round pick, acquired by ATL via HOU in 5-team trade July 2023. Sent to LAC in Mann trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#22)
assetsGivenUp.note: Hawks' own 2025 first-round pick. ATL drafted Drake Powell #22, then traded him to Brooklyn in Porzingis 3-team deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick via CLE
assetsGivenUp.note: Cleveland's 2031 2nd-round pick, sent to Boston in Porzingis 3-team deal.
